summary: A Go-based orchestration runner integrating MCP handlers with a heavily automated, agent-driven test generation pipeline.
concerns: highly fragmented test generation across numerous agent sessions
potential test duplication between root and agent-generated extra tests
auto-committed session metadata cluttering git history
suggestions: consolidate overlapping extra test files from GOrchestra agent sessions
establish a gating mechanism for auto-generated tests to prevent bloat
clean up or ignore automated session metadata commits in version control
